data.body: Evidence for AC3 (external/operational): the v0.7.0 GitHub Release EXISTS and is marked Latest. Verified with 'gh release list --repo navapbc/rebar' → 'v0.7.0  Latest  v0.7.0'. Release URL: https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/releases/tag/v0.7.0 with assets nava_rebar-0.7.0-py3-none-any.whl + nava_rebar-0.7.0.tar.gz attached. Created as a one-off via 'gh release create v0.7.0 --generate-notes --latest' because PyPI 0.7.0 is immutable and the tag workflow cannot be safely re-run. AC1 (GH_REPO fix) merged as change 316; AC2 (next tag release auto-creates) is forward-looking and covered by the merged fix.
